race.comment: A good race. LORD OF BISCAY (1) settled back off a wide gate first-up and then found the line strongly beaten just 1.2L over 1400m at Newcastle. Came off an easy trial win and is still well shy of his best. Has been kept on the fresh side and is proven second-up. Tough to beat with average luck in the run. FLYING EMBERS (12) missed by 1.3L over 1100m at Warwick Farm first up. Her comfortable win at Randwick two over 1400m reads well. Maps to get every chance and should go close. MISS SPACEGIRL (11) spiked her numbers narrowly beaten over 1400m at Warwick Farm. That stacks up, and he has the blinkers applied for the first time. Can feature with average luck from an awkward barrier. MAILATA (5) resumed over 1200m at Rosehill and finished 1.3L behind AUDREY'S LANE. He's further improved and has won second-up. Maps well and also has claims. IMPOSANT (10) has a cruel barrier but has the ability and will be better for a solid effort in the Group 3 Newcastle Stakes.
